children.characters: RBAC: Administration is hidden for Standard Users (server also rejects with 403).

children.name: Plan tiers other than “Pro”, unit prices
children.characters: Plan tiers other than “Pro”, unit prices and included quotas are not defined in the ground truth — the widgets below are the layout contract; every monetary figure is a placeholder pending the pricing decision.

children.name: Meter caps/quotas: placeholder scale — s
children.characters: Meter caps/quotas: placeholder scale — see the [OPEN] pricing item. Usage events stream from the same Event Bus that drives the dashboard.

children.name: Invoice PDFs are generated via Docs Chai
children.characters: Invoice PDFs are generated via Docs Chain and carry the effective Account brand + the locked Helix Development attribution (theming.md §9).

children.name: Banner at page top; processing continues
children.characters: Banner at page top; processing continues per grace policy [OPEN — grace period undefined].

children.name: Warn badge + email notification; caps th
children.characters: Warn badge + email notification; caps themselves are [OPEN] pricing.

children.name: No invoices yet — the first closes at cy
children.characters: No invoices yet — the first closes at cycle end.

children.name: Cycle dates shown so the user knows when
children.characters: Cycle dates shown so the user knows when to expect one.

children.name: Hidden from nav for Standard Users; API
children.characters: Hidden from nav for Standard Users; API rejects defensively.

children.name: Helix Development attribution is locked
children.characters: Helix Development attribution is locked — it persists under any white-label.
